title: DSC 106 Lab 1: Portfolio Setup
description: Built a personal portfolio website from scratch using HTML and CSS, including a homepage, projects page, CV, and contact form.

title: DSC 106 Lab 2: CSS Layout
description: Styled the portfolio with Flexbox and CSS Grid, including a responsive projects grid and a well-structured contact form.

title: DSC 106 Lab 3: JavaScript & Data
description: Added dynamic content loading using JavaScript, fetching project data from JSON and GitHub API data for the homepage.

title: DSC 80: Data Cleaning Pipeline
description: Built a data cleaning and feature engineering pipeline in Python using pandas to prepare a real-world dataset for machine learning.

title: DSC 80: Predictive Model
description: Trained and evaluated classification models on a cleaned dataset, using cross-validation and hyperparameter tuning to maximize accuracy.

title: DSC 30: Data Structures
description: Implemented core data structures (heaps, hash maps, BSTs) in Java and analyzed their time and space complexity.

title: DSC 40A: Theoretical Foundations
description: Explored the mathematical foundations of data science including linear algebra, probability, and optimization for regression and classification.

title: DSC 10: Intro Data Science
description: Completed exploratory data analysis projects using Python, pandas, and matplotlib to uncover insights from real-world datasets.

title: Pokémon Stats Explorer
description: Built an interactive data visualization tool to explore Pokémon stats and compare them across generations and types using Python.

title: UCSD Course Scheduler
description: Developed a command-line tool to parse UCSD course offerings and suggest conflict-free schedules based on user preferences.

title: SQL Movie Database
description: Designed and queried a relational movie database in SQL, writing complex joins and aggregations to answer analytical questions.

title: Climate Data Analysis
description: Analyzed historical climate datasets to identify temperature trends over decades, visualized with interactive charts using D3.js.
